message:
Accelerate verifier economy registry with index sets and Ed25519 key caching

Replace O(N) linear scans for duplicate public keys and attestation
submissions with BTreeSet index lookups (registered_public_keys,
attestation_fingerprints). Cache parsed Ed25519 verifying keys per
verifier in parsed_verifier_keys BTreeMap to avoid repeated hex-decode
and curve validation on every attestation submission. Refactor
build_scoreboard() from O(V*A) nested iteration to single-pass O(V+A)
accumulation via PublishedVerifierStats. Extract
parse_ed25519_verifying_key_hex() and verify_ed25519_signature_with_key_hex()
into the verifier SDK for reuse by downstream signature verifiers.
Ensure eviction logic properly cleans up index sets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
